title: Operating bike rental shop facing a major event claim
prompt: A bike rental shop in Steveston normally receives 1-5 weekday orders and 2-7 weekend orders. Another report predicts 50-80 weekday orders during a major 2026 football event because Metro Vancouver will receive many visitors. Assess whether the shop should buy a large non-refundable fleet now.

patterns: 不能.*(?:游客|遊客|人流).*(?:订单|訂單)
reservation|deposit|preorder|landing page|pilot|预订|預訂|订金|訂金

forbidden_patterns.pattern: traffic tsunami|流量海[啸嘯]|guaranteed sellout|庫存一定秒空|库存一定秒空

critical_failures: Treats regional event attendance as direct store demand.
Accepts 50-80 as a central case without direct behavior, mechanism, and capacity evidence.
Recommends a large irreversible fleet purchase without a user-supplied loss constraint.
human_rubric: Does the response use the operating baseline before external macro data?
Are geography, time, category need, exposure, payment, displacement, and capacity distinguished?
Is the next action reversible and tied to success and failure thresholds?
